title: Who did the art to the EoE poster and is it in an art book
display_title: Who did the art to the EoE poster and is it in an art book
wikitext:
[]: Who did the art to the EoE poster, and is it in an art book?             Quote Post by deeRez » Thu Jan 26, 2012 12:32 am Did Sadamoto do the art behind the End of Evangelion poster? And if so, is the full image in one of his art books?

[]: Re: Who did the art to the EoE poster, and is it in an art b             Quote Post by svenge » Thu Jan 26, 2012 1:55 am deeRez wrote: Did Sadamoto do the art behind the End of Evangelion poster? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Thu Jan 26, 2012 5:28 am Thank you for the informative post.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Jan 26, 2012 11:11 am That poster always gave me the creeps...

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Jan 26, 2012 3:29 pm Love the poster. Nothing summarises the WTF better. Whenever I think of EoE this scene comes to my mind first. Interesting trivia, svenge. I wasn't aware about the later added black area which in my opinion blanks the whole thing better out.
